# STRAT.004 ? Clausewitzian Strategy

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** military_strategic
**Domain:** MILITARY_STRATEGIC
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
War is politics by other means; center of gravity; friction and fog; trinity of people/army/government; escalation to extremes

## Application
Connect actions to political aims; identify and attack center of gravity; expect friction; balance trinity; understand escalation dynamics

## Key Values
- Political aims
- Center of gravity
- Friction awareness
- Trinity balance
- Strategic purpose

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, military_strategic

Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
